title: Crystal Armor Pack
body:
# ✨ Crystal Armor Resource Pack

Shine brighter than diamonds! The Crystal Armor Pack by AstroDev brings a sleek, glowing, and high-quality look to your armor — designed for players who want style and power.

# 💎 Features

**🧥 Fully custom armor textures (Crystal-themed)
🌈 Animated glow effect for an elegant shimmer
⚙️ Works on all Minecraft 1.21+ versions
🪞 Designed to be lightweight and performance-friendly
🎨 Perfect for PvP, survival, or showcase packs
🧩 Compatibility
✅ Minecraft Java Edition (1.21+)
✅ Works with OptiFine, Iris, and Vanilla
❌ Does not require any mods**

# 📦 Installation

**Download the .zip file
Place it in your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder
Enable it in Settings → Resource Packs**

Enjoy your new crystal shine 💠

# Created by AstroDev
🌐 astro-dev.xyz
💬 Discord: dev.astrodude.gg
